    Editor in Chief

    Dr. Christina Cuomo

    Editor in Chief (2026) | Broad Institute of MIT and Brown University

    Christina A. Cuomo, Ph. D., is a professor of molecular microbiology and = immunology at Brown University and Visiting= Scientist at the Broad Institute. She has served as a senior editor fo= r ASM's journal Microbiology Resource Announcements and as an edit= or for Microbial Genomics.

span.leaderboard-label { font-size: 10px; display: block; transform-origin:= 0px 0px; transform: rotate(90deg); position: absolute; } .boombox-wrapper { margin: 30px 0px; } span.boombox-label { font-size: 10px; text-align: center; display: block; m= ax-width: 300px; } #gs-casa-c { width: 80px !important; } #gs-casa-b { width: 70px !important; } h3.trendmd-widget-header__heading { font-size: 18px !important; font-family= : Montserrat, sans-serif !important; } .article-footer-element { margin: 0px auto; max-width: 888px; } @media (min-width: 1173px) { .article-footer-element { margin-left: 4vw; max-width: 700px; } } @media (min-width: 1401px) { .article-footer-element { margin-left: 11vw; max-width: 729px; } } @media (min-width: 1920px) { .article-footer-element { margin-left: 22vw; } } .sections-navbar__toggle { font-size: 1.8rem; background: rgb(112, 112, 112= ) !important; padding: 0.5rem !important; } .sections-navbar__toggle i.icon-list { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .loi__item__cover img { border: 1px solid rgb(0, 0, 0); } #supplementary-materials [role=3D"listitem"] { position: initial; } .journals-list img { border: 1px solid rgb(0, 0, 0); } @media (max-width: 767px) { [data-widget-def~=3D"ux3-layout-widget"] > .container, [data-widget-def~= =3D"ux3-layout-widget"] .container:first-child { margin-right: 15px; margin= -left: 15px; } } @media (max-width: 1171px) { .card-2__thumb { padding-top: 59% !important; background-size: contain; } } @media (min-width: 532px) { .header--generic .header__hero { background: rgb(246, 245, 245); color: r= gb(0, 0, 0); } .header--generic .header__hero::after { background: rgb(246, 245, 245); } .header--generic .header__hero > .container { padding-left: 0px; padding-= right: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; } } .related-tabs li.tab__nav__item:nth-child(2) { display: none; } .sections-navbar__subtitle { display: none; } .lp__box { position: relative; min-height: 150px; } .lp__box__content { width: 70%; } .card-link { position: absolute; inset: 0px; } .card-link:hover { background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); } .mt-10 { margin-top: 10px !important; } .mt-15 { margin-top: 15px !important; } .mt-20 { margin-top: 20px !important; } .mt-30 { margin-top: 30px !important; } .mb-10 { margin-bottom: 10px !important; } .mb-15 { margin-bottom: 15px !important; } .mb-20 { margin-bottom: 20px !important; } .mb-30 { margin-bottom: 30px !important; } .ac-nav a { color: rgb(21, 84, 178); text-decoration: none; } .ac-nav a:hover { text-decoration: underline; } .ac-nav-left { list-style: none; padding: 0px; margin: 10px 0px 30px; } .ac-nav-left > li { margin-bottom: 10px; padding-left: 15px; font-size: 15p= x; } .ac-nav-left-sub > li { margin-bottom: 10px; } .ac-resources { border-top: 2px solid rgb(204, 204, 204); border-bottom: 2p= x solid rgb(204, 204, 204); padding: 20px 15px; font-size: 14px; } .ac-resources li { margin-bottom: 10px; } .ac-nav-left-sub { list-style: none; margin: 10px 0px 20px; padding: 0px 0p= x 0px 20px; font-size: 13px; } .ac-nav-item.active, .ac-nav-item.open { position: relative; } .ac-nav-item > .ac-nav-left-sub { display: none; } .ac-nav-item.open > .ac-nav-left-sub { display: block; } .ac-nav-item.active > a, .ac-nav-item.open > a { color: rgb(0, 0, 0); font-= weight: bold; } .ac-nav-left > .ac-nav-item.open::before { content: ""; width: 6px; height:= 6px; display: block; background: rgb(183, 32, 42); position: absolute; lef= t: 0px; top: 7px; } .check-btn label { display: inline-block; } .check-btn input { display: none; } .check-btn input:checked ~ .menu-toggle { display: block; } @media (min-width: 1024px) { .check-btn label { display: none; } } @media (max-width: 1023px) { .menu-toggle { display: none; } } .lp__box__icon { background: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; } .pb-dropzone-mode .pb-widget > .pb-hover-toolbar { top: 0px; } .contact-wrapper p { width: 46%; padding-right: 20px; display: inline-block= ; vertical-align: top; } @media (max-width: 767px) { .contact-wrapper p { width: 100%; padding-right: 0px; } } .text-left { text-align: left !important; } .text-right { text-align: right !important; } .text-center { text-align: center !important; } .ed-3col p { width: 31%; min-width: 270px; padding-right: 1.4em; display: i= nline-block; vertical-align: top; } .ed-4col p { width: 22%; min-width: 200px; padding-right: 1em; display: inl= ine-block; vertical-align: top; } .ed-3col p em, .ed-4col p em { color: rgb(112, 112, 112); } @media (max-width: 991px) { .ed-3col p, .ed-4col p { width: 47%; } } @media (max-width: 767px) { .ed-3col p, .ed-4col p { width: 100%; } } .blockquote { margin-bottom: 1rem; font-size: 1.25rem; } .blockquote-footer { display: block; font-size: 80%; color: rgb(108, 117, 1= 25); } .blockquote-footer::before { content: "=E2=80=94=C2=A0"; } .list-unstyled { padding-left: 0px; list-style: none; } .div-1 { background-color: rgb(235, 235, 235); } .rounded-sm { border-radius: 0.2rem !important; } .rounded { border-radius: 0.25rem !important; } .rounded-top { border-top-left-radius: 0.25rem !important; border-top-right= -radius: 0.25rem !important; } .rounded-right { border-top-right-radius: 0.25rem !important; border-bottom= -right-radius: 0.25rem !important; } .rounded-bottom { border-bottom-right-radius: 0.25rem !important; border-bo= ttom-left-radius: 0.25rem !important; } .rounded-left { border-top-left-radius: 0.25rem !important; border-bottom-l= eft-radius: 0.25rem !important; } .rounded-lg { border-radius: 0.3rem !important; } .rounded-circle { border-radius: 50% !important; } .rounded-pill { border-radius: 50rem !important; } .rounded-0 { border-radius: 0px !important; } .lead { font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 300; } .text-lowercase { text-transform: lowercase !important; } .text-uppercase { text-transform: uppercase !important; } .text-capitalize { text-transform: capitalize !important; } .list-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; padding-left: 0px; mar= gin-bottom: 0px; border-radius: 0.25rem; } .list-group-item-action { width: 100%; color: rgb(73, 80, 87); text-align: = inherit; } .list-group-item-action:hover, .list-group-item-action:focus { z-index: 1; = color: rgb(73, 80, 87); text-decoration: none; background-color: rgb(248, 2= 49, 250); } .list-group-item-action:active { color: rgb(33, 37, 41); background-color: = rgb(233, 236, 239); } .list-group-item { position: relative; display: block; padding: 0.75rem 1.2= 5rem; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); border: 1px background-color: rgb(250, 250, 250); line-height: 1.4; overflow-wra= p: break-word; min-height: 100vh; overflow-x: hidden; } .content { padding-bottom: 0.9375rem; } .fixed-element { position: sticky; z-index: 5; top: 8.125rem; } @media (max-width: 1171px) { .fixed-element { top: 5.625rem; } } @media (max-width: 767px) { .fixed-element { top: 3.5rem; } } .fixed-element.header { z-index: 10; } .page__content { padding: 3rem 0px 3.5rem; } @media (max-width: 1171px) { .page__content { padding: 2.625rem 0px 0px; } } .padding-wrapper { padding-right: 2.5rem; padding-left: 2.5rem; } @media (max-width: 1023px) and (min-width: 768px) { .padding-wrapper { padding-right: 1.25rem; padding-left: 1.25rem; } } @media (max-width: 1023px) and (min-width: 768px) { .padding-wrapper-tablet { padding-right: 2.5rem; padding-left: 2.5rem; } } @media (max-width: 767px) { .padding-wrapper { padding-right: 0px; padding-left: 0px; } } .dark-secondary-color { color: rgb(51, 51, 51); } .lock-screen, .modal-open, .noscroll { overflow: hidden; } .lock-screen.iOS, .modal-open.iOS, .noscroll.iOS { max-width: 100%; width: = 100%; } .shift-up-content { position: relative; top: -2.5rem; } .full-width { width: 100%; } .no-margin { margin: 0px; } .styled-link { font-weight: 700; text-decoration: underline; color: rgb(183= , 19, 42); font-size: 0.75rem; } .general-link { text-decoration: underline; color: rgb(21, 84, 178); } .uppercase { text-transform: uppercase; } .lowercase { text-transform: lowercase; } .capitalize { text-transform: capitalize; } .transformLess { text-transform: none !important; } .align_center, .text-center { text-align: center; } .text-sm { font-size: 0.875rem; } .text-xs { font-size: 0.75rem; } .underline { text-decoration: underline; } .bold { font-weight: 700; } .weight-500 { font-weight: 500; } .weight-800 { font-weight: 800; } .inline-block { display: inline-block; } .inline { display: inline; } hr.divider { display: block; height: 0.0625rem; border-width: 0.0625rem 0px= 0px; border-style: solid none none; border-color: rgb(217, 217, 217) curre= ntcolor currentcolor; border-image: initial; margin: 1rem 0px; padding: 0px= ; } .secondary-container { width: 100%; margin: 0px auto; } @media (min-width: 1280px) { .secondary-container { max-width: 1280px; } } .sticky { position: sticky; top: 0px; } .no-pointer-events { .container .header { background: none 0px 0px repeat scr= oll rgb(229, 236, 249); padding: 2px; cursor: pointer; font-weight: 700; } .commerceExplainer .container .header::before { content: "+ "; } .commerceExplainer .container .content { display: none; } .commerceExplainer .container .header.expanded::before { content: "- "; } .commerceExplainer .container .header.collapsed::before { content: 0px; } .advanced-search-tabs .tab__nav li { padding: 0px 0.5rem; font-size: 1rem; = line-height: 1.25; flex: 0 1 auto; } .advanced-search-tabs .tab__nav li.active a { color: rgb(0, 0, 0); }
